It is NOT the full BurnMessageV2 struct.      `sender` is the address that called depositForBurnWithHook = CrosschainEscrow (bytes32).","params":{"messageBody":"Raw hookData = abi.encode(finalRecipient, unlockTimestamp, amount).","sender":"CrosschainEscrow address on source chain, left-padded to bytes32.","sourceDomain":"Source chain CCTP domain (Arc Testnet = 26)."}}},"title":"TimeLockHook (v5 \u2014 hookData-only design)","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"claim(bytes32)":{"notice":"Claim time-locked USDC after the unlock timestamp."},"computeReleaseId(uint32,bytes32,address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Pre-compute the releaseId for a pending transfer (matches handleReceiveMessage)."},"handleReceiveMessage(uint32,bytes32,bytes)":{"notice":"Called by TokenMessengerV2 after minting USDC to this contract."},"tokenMessenger()":{"notice":"The Circle TokenMessengerV2 on this chain \u2014 the ONLY allowed caller of         handleReceiveMessage(). This is TokenMessengerV2, not MessageTransmitterV2."}},"notice":"CCTP v2 hook contract deployed on destination chains (e.g. Ethereum Sepolia). \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510 \u2502  FLOW                                                                       \u2502 \u2502                                                                             \u2502 \u2502  1. Sender on Arc calls CrosschainEscrow.initiateConditionalTransfer with:  \u2502 \u2502       recipient  = address(TimeLockHook)  \u2190 this contract on dest chain    \u2502 \u2502       hookData   = abi.encode(finalRecipient, unlockTimestamp, amount)      \u2502 \u2502                                                                             \u2502 \u2502  2. Circle attests. Anyone calls:                                           \u2502 \u2502       MessageTransmitterV2.receiveMessage(messageBytes, attestation)        \u2502 \u2502     \u2192 TokenMessengerV2 mints USDC to address(TimeLockHook)                 \u2502 \u2502     \u2192 TokenMessengerV2 calls TimeLockHook.handleReceiveMessage(             \u2502 \u2502           sourceDomain,                                                     \u2502 \u2502           sender,       \u2190 CrosschainEscrow on source chain (bytes32)       \u2502 \u2502           hookData      \u2190 the raw hookData bytes from the burn, NOT        \u2502 \u2502                            the full BurnMessageV2 struct                    \u2502 \u2502         )                                                                   \u2502 \u2502                                                                             \u2502 \u2502  3. TimeLockHook decodes hookData and stores a PendingRelease.             \u2502 \u2502                                                                             \u2502 \u2502  4. After unlockTimestamp, finalRecipient calls:                            \u2502 \u2502       TimeLockHook.claim(releaseId)                                         \u2502 \u2502     \u2192 USDC transferred to finalRecipient                                   \u2502 \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518 KEY DESIGN INSIGHT:   Circle passes hookData (not the full BurnMessageV2) as the `messageBody`   parameter to handleReceiveMessage. The `sender` parameter is the address   that called depositForBurnWithHook on the source chain = CrosschainEscrow. hookData encoding (96 bytes):   abi.encode(address finalRecipient, uint256 unlockTimestamp, uint256 amount)   Amount is included so the contract knows how much USDC to release on claim. releaseId (deterministic, pre-computable by frontend):   keccak256(abi.encode(sourceDomain, sender_bytes32, finalRecipient, amount, unlockTimestamp))   where sender_bytes32 = CrosschainEscrow left-padded to bytes32. Caller hierarchy on destination chain:   MessageTransmitterV2 (0xE737...275) \u2192 TokenMessengerV2 (0x8FE6...DAA) \u2192 us   msg.sender in handleReceiveMessage = TokenMessengerV2","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/TimeLockHook.sol":"TimeLockHook"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/IERC20.sol":{"keccak256":"0x9ac7895c65853fb5b98f95d1f967e313f4a2a823a9a70409d73b48f23f1c7aa8","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://a24ccfc240c86caacbfe65266375f036381985555d8176b98cad4a9f98d23b5e","dweb:/ipfs/Qmf2WnEs4CVK9pmgQ4SAhtkZtg6qKhViY7G5gteJfJeeyy"]},"src/TimeLockHook.sol":{"keccak256":"0x469c00d457f2f9d3738f1a26bc8236a521f487a12e3c4fb6db60e929e40f1fc2","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://bed7023583ca1def51b5a88d6e759e277978dcc97248a07d05f435205dd07489","dweb:/ipfs/QmQqowM3zrm9UNZFEEUWA6vFL7oJi9kE7jbYbVzV4aTAmC"]}},"version":1}

params.releaseId: The release ID emitted in the ReleaseScheduled event or pre-computed.

params.amount: USDC amount (6 decimals), same value encoded in hookData.
params.finalRecipient: Address that will receive USDC after unlock.
params.messageSender: CrosschainEscrow address on source chain, left-padded to bytes32.
params.unlockTimestamp: Unix timestamp after which claim() is allowed.

handleReceiveMessage(uint32,bytes32,byte.details: msg.sender MUST be the Circle TokenMessengerV2 on this chain.      Call chain: receiveMessage() → MessageTransmitterV2 → TokenMessengerV2 → us      IMPORTANT: `messageBody` is the raw hookData bytes passed to depositForBurnWithHook      on the source chain. It is NOT the full BurnMessageV2 struct.      `sender` is the address that called depositForBurnWithHook = CrosschainEscrow (bytes32).

params.sender: CrosschainEscrow address on source chain, left-padded to bytes32.

claim(bytes32).notice: Claim time-locked USDC after the unlock timestamp.

computeReleaseId(uint32,bytes32,address,.notice: Pre-compute the releaseId for a pending transfer (matches handleReceiveMessage).

handleReceiveMessage(uint32,bytes32,byte.notice: Called by TokenMessengerV2 after minting USDC to this contract.

tokenMessenger().notice: The Circle TokenMessengerV2 on this chain — the ONLY allowed caller of         handleReceiveMessage(). This is TokenMessengerV2, not MessageTransmitterV2.
